sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3409" key="a)kraifno/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκραιφνότης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τητος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n3409.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">purity</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in Prm.(Rh.Mus.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">47.614</biblScope> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
